events.title: Drone Attacks Target Gulf Vessels
events.desc: Multiple drones targeted vessels in the Gulf, with one striking a freighter en route to Qatar. The UAE accused Iran of the attack on its territory, marking a potential escalation following a month-long ceasefire.

events.title: Kuwaiti Military Repels Drone Attack
events.desc: The Kuwaiti military announced it had detected and dealt with hostile drones in its airspace, preventing an attack. The origin of the drones was not specified.

events.title: Iran Sends Response to US Ceasefire Proposal
events.desc: Iran has submitted its response to a U.S. proposal aimed at ending the ongoing conflict, conveyed through Pakistan as a mediator. The initial focus of negotiations is reportedly on a cessation of hostilities.

events.title: Israeli Strikes in Gaza Test Ceasefire
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes in Gaza resulted in at least three Palestinian casualties, including two Hamas-run police officers. This violence highlights the precariousness of the U.S.-brokered ceasefire.

events.title: Iranian Military Warns of New Warfare Methods
events.desc: Iran's army spokesman issued a warning that future attacks would be met with 'surprising' new methods of warfare, implying a readiness to retaliate with unconventional tactics.

events.title: Libya Refinery Resumes Operations After Fighting
events.desc: Libya's Zawiya refinery has returned to full operational capacity after a two-day closure due to fighting in the vicinity of the facility.

events.title: Lebanon Reports Israeli Strikes Killing Nine
events.desc: At least nine people were killed in Israeli strikes across southern Lebanon, with raids also targeting a highway near Beirut. These attacks represent a significant escalation despite a recent ceasefire.

events.title: Israeli Strike Kills Seven in South Lebanon
events.desc: An Israeli strike in Saksakiyeh, southern Lebanon, killed at least seven individuals, including a child, and injured 15. The Israeli military stated they targeted Hezbollah militants planning attacks.

events.title: UK Deploys Warship to Middle East for Hormuz Mission
events.desc: The UK is deploying the warship HMS Dragon to the Middle East, preparing for a potential multinational operation to secure shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Pakistan Police Post Car Bombing
events.desc: A car bombing at a police post in Bannu, northwestern Pakistan, killed at least twelve policemen, followed by a confrontation with militants. The attack destroyed the police installation.

events.title: Damaged Heritage Sites in Iran
events.desc: Conservationists are working to repair historic sites in Iran damaged by the war with the U.S. and Israel, though some repairs are expected to take years. Golestan Palace in Tehran sustained damage from shockwaves.

events.title: Iran War Impacts Asian Economies
events.desc: Asian economies are facing significant challenges due to rising fuel costs, inflation, and debt pressures stemming from the ongoing conflict in Iran.

events.title: Iran's IRGC Compound and School Strike Detailed
events.desc: New videos confirm strikes on an IRGC compound and adjacent school in Minab, Iran, showing multiple missile impacts. The strikes occurred in late February.

events.title: Destruction of Iranian Police Infrastructure
events.desc: Efforts to 'Make Iran Ungovernable' have resulted in the damage or destruction of at least 80 police stations and Basij paramilitary infrastructure within the first three weeks of the U.S. and Israeli war against Iran, aiming to degrade the regime's 'repressive capacity'.

events.title: Syria Trial of Atef Najib Begins
events.desc: Atef Najib, a cousin of former Syrian President Bashar al-Assad, faces at least 10 charges, including murder, torture, and responsibility for massacres, in a landmark trial.
